description: Google Cloud Error Reporting groups and counts application errors from Google Cloud services and custom applications. It provides APIs to report error events and inspect error groups, events, and statistics.
summary: Google Cloud Error Reporting exposes a REST API at `https://clouderrorreporting.googleapis.com/v1beta1` and an MCP server at `https://clouderrorreporting.googleapis.com/mcp`; the MCP endpoint is publicly accessible per seed facts, while the REST API authentication details were not machine-confirmed from the retrieved docs.
